A statement is given below, followed by two assumptions, I and II. You have to consider the statement to be true even if it seems at variance with commonly known facts and then decide which of the given assumptions is/are implicit in the statement.

I. Chocolate contains a high amount of sugar, as a result of which bacteria can develop.
II. Brushing twice a day keeps the teeth strong.
o: Neither I nor II is implicit
Both I and II are implicit
